### zach (FRB 20220207C)
| strand | status | consumers | scope |
|---|---|---|---|
| association | trusted | `sec:results-association`, `sec:toa`, `sec:toa-pcc`, `fig:association-summary` | V6 revalidated 2026-07-07; residuals, P_cc, and verdicts quotable under the shared-DSA-DM reference convention |
| dm_obs | trusted | `sec:dm-measurement`, `sec:dm` | V6; adoption uniformly chime_primary; CHIME-DSA agreement documented; byte parity enforced by tests/test_verified_dm_manuscript.py |
| dm_budget | trusted | `sec:budget`, `sec:results-budget`, `eq:dmbudget` | V5 cleared 2026-07-07; NE2001/YMW16 disk terms, 40 pc/cc halo prior, Macquart mean, and mNFW two-phase DM_int restored |
| foreground_census | trusted | `sec:foreground`, `sec:dominant-systems`, `fig:clusters_icm`, `fig:sightline_halo_grid` | V4 cleared 2026-07-07; 35-system census (Wen & Han 2024 DESI Legacy/WISE); tab:foreground and fig:clusters_icm restored |
| scintillation_dsa | blocked | ‚Äî | DSA-band decorrelation-bandwidth fits and the two-screen table are revoked pending verification-protocol / wayfinder redo tickets; the CHIME campaign re-establishes both bands |
| scintillation_chime | diagnostic | ‚Äî | PR #192 executed standard and high-resolution CHIME products; this sightline has no qualified record and remains diagnostic_only under named artifact/support/figure gates |
| scattering | blocked | ‚Äî | wave-1 fit-trust reset 2026-07-06; re-admitted railed-hi Tier-B (PPC-verified C1D1 joint fit) but suspended pending ¬ßV (V1) and geometry model selection |
| energies | blocked | ‚Äî | fit-trust reset; no energy citable pending ¬ßV (V3); requires spectroscopic host z and a joint c0,gamma fit; gamma_D pile-up near -5 and a selection-rule contradiction flagged for the pass |
